# Espanso Typofixer English

These packages are an (updated) port of [SyntaxAutoFix](https://github.com/Mte90/SyntaxAutoFix) a collection of typos fixed for English language (aggregates English typo-correction rules from multiple sources, so it may include both US and UK spelling variants.).

Project repo to contribute: [https://github.com/Mte90/espanso-typofixer](https://github.com/Mte90/espanso-typofixer)
